tool_args.label: Retirement of Eric Osnes
tool_args.raw_text: Vice President and Chief Safety Officer Osnes ... retiring later this month.

payload.claim_text: Vice President and Chief Safety Officer Eric Osnes retired in December 2023 after seven years at TBTA. During his tenure, TBTA's collision rate was reduced by more than 30%.
payload.subject: Eric Osnes

tool_args.label: TCS NYC Marathon at Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge
tool_args.raw_text: The 52nd running of the TCS New York City Marathon kicked off on November 5th from its traditional starting line at TBTA's Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge (VNB). More than 50,000 participants along with a sea of event organizers and officials convened for the race.

payload.claim_text: The 52nd running of the TCS New York City Marathon started on November 5th from the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge with more than 50,000 participants.
payload.subject: TCS New York City Marathon

tool_args.label: 2023 All-Time High Vehicle Crossings
tool_args.raw_text: In 2023, B&T preliminary recorded an all-time high vehicle crossing number which was more than 2.5% higher than 2022 and over 0.5% higher than 2019 when B&T recorded more than 334 million crossings.

tool_args.label: TBTA-FDNY Joint Tabletop Exercise
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA Department Heads presented a review of TBTA's joint tabletop exercise with the FDNY's Center for Terrorism & Disaster Preparedness Exercise Design Team, centered on a Bronx-Whitestone Bridge incident scenario involving a fuel tanker that disables toll collection systems.

payload.claim_text: TBTA conducted a joint tabletop exercise with FDNY's Center for Terrorism & Disaster Preparedness centered on a Bronx-Whitestone Bridge incident scenario involving a fuel tanker that disables toll collection systems.
payload.subject: TBTA
